## v4.0.0 — Clean slate, honest positioning

Strip commercial infrastructure and restore the repo to what it is: a session-based Slack MCP server that works with any MCP client.

### Changed
- **README rewritten** — Removed 34+ tracking URLs, sales funnel, and marketing copy. Restored original voice. New opener: "Slack MCP server. Session-based auth, 16 tools, stdio transport. Works with Claude, Cursor, Copilot, and basically anything that speaks MCP."
- **25 files removed** — Launch ops, demand tracking, revenue routing, marketplace readiness, and commercial automation. Net -2,762 lines.
- **Public pages simplified** — Metadata stripped from 107 to 22 lines. Template tokens cleaned. Dead npm scripts removed.

### Security
- `fs.chmodSync` on token file writes
- API key redaction in dashboard URL output
- `safeParseInt` guards on numeric API parameters

### Added
- `.claude/settings.json` for Claude Code MCP integration

### Compatibility
- All 16 MCP tools unchanged. No renames or removals.
- All CLI entry points unchanged (`--setup`, `--status`, `--doctor`, `web`, `http`).
- Existing configs continue to work.

### Verify
```bash
npx -y @jtalk22/slack-mcp@latest --version
npx -y @jtalk22/slack-mcp@latest --setup
npx -y @jtalk22/slack-mcp@latest --status
```

### Support
- Self-host bugs and docs fixes: GitHub issues with exact version, runtime mode, and error output.
- Managed Cloud: https://mcp.revasserlabs.com/support

Maintained by James Lambert (`jtalk22`) under Revasser.
